_comment: 070: pre-registered F03/F04/F05 staged adoption + subgroup gate (fixed BEFORE OOS, III). Reuses 069 paired-eval/subgroup machinery. Per-bundle keep/drop matrix + formula params frozen here. top_noninferior/calibration are TOP-LEVEL to match 068 _build_gate cfg.get() reads (never nest).

subgroup_guard._comment: Same intersection-union three-way as 069. adopted requires ALL critical subgroups PASS.
subgroup_guard._coverage_bands_note: DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY: cov_0/cov_1_2/cov_3plus need obs_count wiring (not live-wired in current CLI, codex B2) and are NOT in critical_subgroups — they do not gate adoption.

eval_window._comment: Pre-registered OOS window (III). Same as 069 so verdicts are comparable.

staged_evaluation._comment: FR-006a per-arm keep/drop matrix. RECORD-ONLY: current CLI does NOT consume this block (codex 論点3) — the operator runs each stage's explicit --candidate/--active recipe from contracts/cli.md. group names expanded to columns via _expand_group_drops, dropped SYMMETRICALLY from both arms. Each stage verdict fixed BEFORE next baseline. Final verdict = gate.adopted AND subgroup_guard (driver-applied, codex B2). F05 residual only if F04 ADOPT.
staged_evaluation._stage_numbering: num = paired-eval 通し番号 (段1-5); bookkeeping entries have num=null. spec FR-006a / tasks / contracts all use this 段1-5 mapping.

stages._base_note: base = accuracy-first (lgbm-064-f02acc) recipe keeping pm_core_strength (F02); NOT the p⊥q default lgbm-063 (codex/analyze I1).

stages._note: BOOKKEEPING (not a paired-eval): after stage f03_replace, the WINNER stays in base and the LOSER is dropped from BOTH arms downstream. ADOPT(F03) => drop past_market (058 loser); REJECT(F03) => drop pm_rank_robust (F03 loser). This is spec FR-006a step 2 (analyze I2/F1).

BOOKKEEPING (not a paired-eval, symmetric to f03_verdict_resolution, analyze F1): after f04_add, the WINNER stays in the downstream base. ADOPT(F04) => downstream base KEEPS pm_expectation_residual; REJECT(F04) => pm_expectation_residual dropped from stages 3-5 base. This prevents F05 support/residual being credited for variance an adopted F04 already explains (III attribution).

stages._base: F03-resolved + F04-resolved base (keeps F03-winner AND adopted F04). candidate = base + pm_conditioned_support; active = base.

stages._adopt_def: ADOPT = composite gate.adopted AND subgroup_guard (analyze A1, same as FR-006a final verdict).
stages._base: ACCUMULATED base = F03-winner + adopted F04 + adopted F05 support (consistent with the accumulating staged pattern; residual's marginal is measured BEYOND an adopted support so overlap is not double-credited, III attribution). If f05_support was REJECTED, support is dropped from this base. Matches contracts <F05supportD> placeholder (analyze F1 v2).
ALL adopted groups (F03-winner + adopted F04 + adopted F05 support/residual).
stages._note: NOT an independent confirmatory — same 2019-2026 OOS after staged selection; true confirmation needs an unused time holdout (deferred).

f03_formula._comment: OOS-frozen (III). tie=competition rank (never broken by horse_id/row order). POPULARITY-ONLY complete-field (odds-insensitive robust fallback, codex 見落とし). percentile u=1-(rank-1)/(N_started-1), N=1 => u=1. Columns = spec canonical.
f03_formula._top3_tie_note: under competition rank, top3fav_rate5 counts ALL horses with competition-rank <= 3; ties can push >3 horses to rank<=3 (deterministic, codex B2).
f03_formula._min_obs_note: ALL F03 columns incl. asof_pm_rankpct_last require obs>=3 (analyze A3): a single-observation percentile is unstable/high-variance; the tree gets NaN+has_obs below 3 rather than a noisy 1-obs value.
f03_formula._fav_window_note: favorite_rate5 / top3fav_rate5 rate window = 5 (same as mean_window; explicit so T006a constant-binding can assert it, analyze A2).

f04_formula._comment: OOS-frozen. 2-population split: finish_residual on finished, win_residual on started (non-winner=0, 068 population). v denominator = N_started (matches u scale, NOT N_fin, codex 見落とし). q shared from F02 primitive. Columns = spec canonical (win=mean10, single result_obs_count + resid_sd5).
f04_formula._window_note: win_resid uses a longer window (10) than finish_resid/sd (5) by design (analyze F5): win events are rarer/noisier per race (1 winner) so a longer window stabilises the mean; finish residual and sd are denser per-horse so 5 suffices. Frozen pre-OOS (III).
f04_formula._sd_residual_note: asof_pm_resid_sd5 measures the sd of WIN residual (I(win)-q) over the started population (matches the surfaced started result_obs_count); NOT the finish residual (analyze U1).
f04_formula._sd_min_obs_note: asof_pm_resid_sd5 uses obs<2 -> NaN (ddof=1 needs >=2); the other F04 mean columns use min_obs=3 (codex B1).
f04_formula._2pop_gate_note: OOS-FROZEN DECISION (III, analyze U1): finish_resid_* columns are NaN when the FINISHED-observation count < min_obs (computed internally, NOT the started count) — a horse with many starts but 1 finish must not surface a 1-obs high-variance finish residual. win_resid_* and the surfaced asof_pm_result_obs_count use the STARTED count. Only ONE count column is surfaced (started); the finished-count gate is internal to keep the 6-column contract.

f05_formula._comment: OOS-frozen. 2 registry groups (codex B3): pm_conditioned_support (F02-dep) / pm_conditioned_residual (F04-dep). lambda=5 shrinkage. As-of: fetch latest-cell cumsum/count AND target-prior overall-parent sum/count SEPARATELY then shrink (no carried stale value, codex 論点1). parent=cumsum-current (pool-end independent). PER-AXIS valid_count = REAL cell obs only (codex B5).

serving._comment: codex 論点4/6. features-019 compat pins 018 AND 017 DIRECTLY (non-transitive), using FULL hashes read from artifact metadata (fill at implementation). ANY same-version column-subset drop => NOT_SERVABLE.
serving.not_servable: ANY same-version artifact that drops >=1 column (F03 replacement AND any final candidate dropping unadopted F04/F05) is NOT_SERVABLE_PENDING_PROFILE
